---
title: "PEH Data"
toc: false
sidebar: false
page-layout: full
---

## Interactive PEH data explorer

The interactive explorer below allows you to browse PEH codebooks and studies.  
The application runs on a separate Shiny server and is embedded here for convenience.

```{=html}
<style>
/* Page-only: make the embedded app take maximal space */
.peh-embed-wrap {
  /* break out of Quarto's max-width container */
  width: 100vw;
  margin-left: calc(-50vw + 50%);
  
  /* make it feel "fullscreen" */
  height: calc(100vh - 90px); /* adjust if your top navbar is taller/shorter */
  min-height: 900px;         /* fallback for small viewports */
}

/* iframe itself */
.peh-embed-wrap iframe {
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;
  border: 0;
  display: block;
}

/* reduce extra vertical padding on this page (optional but helps) */
main.content {
  padding-top: 0.5rem;
  padding-bottom: 0.5rem;
}
</style>

<div class="peh-embed-wrap">
  <iframe
    src="https://vito-epi.shinyapps.io/peh_data/"
    title="PEH Data Explorer"
    loading="lazy"
    referrerpolicy="no-referrer"
    allowfullscreen
  ></iframe>
</div>
